passes.text:
(program
  (define
    (pcf-eval e env)
    (match
      e
      ((? fixnum? n) n)
      ((? symbol? x) (hash-ref env x))
      ((quasiquote (lambda ((unquote x)) (unquote body)))
        (quasiquote (closure (unquote x) (unquote body) (unquote env))))
      ((quasiquote (succ (unquote e0))) (+ (pcf-eval e0 env) 1))
      ((quasiquote (pred (unquote e0)))
        (let ((n (pcf-eval e0 env))) (if (eq? n 0) 0 (- n 1))))
      ((quasiquote (ifz (unquote e0) (unquote e1) (unquote e2)))
        (if (eq? (pcf-eval e0 env) 0) (pcf-eval e1 env) (pcf-eval e2 env)))
      ((quasiquote (fix (unquote e0))) (quasiquote (fixpoint (unquote (pcf-eval e0 env)))))
      ((quasiquote ((unquote e-f) (unquote e-a)))
        (pcf-apply (pcf-eval e-f env) (pcf-eval e-a env)))))
  (define
    (pcf-apply vf va)
    (match
      vf
      ((quasiquote (closure (unquote x) (unquote body) (unquote env)))
        (pcf-eval body (hash-set env x va)))
      ((quasiquote (fixpoint (unquote f))) (pcf-apply (pcf-apply f vf) va))))
  (define
    pcf-add
    (quote
      (fix (lambda (add) (lambda (m) (lambda (n) (ifz m n (succ ((add (pred m)) n)))))))))
  (pcf-eval (quasiquote (((unquote pcf-add) 3) 4)) (hash)))

source:
;; A small PCF interpreter: quasiquote patterns in, quasiquote
;; construction out. (Trimmed demo; the full version is example
;; puffin-12 and part of the test corpus.)
(define (pcf-eval e env)
  (match e
    [(? fixnum? n) n]
    [(? symbol? x) (hash-ref env x)]
    [`(lambda (,x) ,body) `(closure ,x ,body ,env)]
    [`(succ ,e0) (+ (pcf-eval e0 env) 1)]
    [`(pred ,e0) (let ([n (pcf-eval e0 env)]) (if (eq? n 0) 0 (- n 1)))]
    [`(ifz ,e0 ,e1 ,e2)
     (if (eq? (pcf-eval e0 env) 0) (pcf-eval e1 env) (pcf-eval e2 env))]
    [`(fix ,e0) `(fixpoint ,(pcf-eval e0 env))]
    [`(,e-f ,e-a) (pcf-apply (pcf-eval e-f env) (pcf-eval e-a env))]))

(define (pcf-apply vf va)
  (match vf
    [`(closure ,x ,body ,env) (pcf-eval body (hash-set env x va))]
    [`(fixpoint ,f) (pcf-apply (pcf-apply f vf) va)]))

(define pcf-add
  '(fix (lambda (add)
          (lambda (m) (lambda (n) (ifz m n (succ ((add (pred m)) n))))))))

(pcf-eval `((,pcf-add 3) 4) (hash))
